props.title: Legends & Lore
props.description: Myrdae canon belongs in the Knowledge Base. This portal should not duplicate or drift from it.

props.links: [{"title":"Suwanee Gamers Knowledge Base","description":"Open the canonical lore, histories, myths, factions, and world notes.","href":"http://kb.suwaneegamers.net","label":"Open KB"},{"title":"Original Google Site","description":"Reference the legacy lore pages while the Knowledge Base remains the source of truth.","href":"https://sites.google.com/view/suwanee-gamers/","label":"Open Reference"}]

props.title: Gazetteer
props.description: A geographic and cultural reference for the known settlements, ruins, and landmarks of Myrdae. Each entry links to its Google Doc in the shared reference archive. Completed entries have full write-ups; in-progress entries are stubs awaiting documentation.

props.title: Fully Documented
props.links: [{"label":"Abbey of Light","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/14hX4cryRE61O6wLcZ26qFtsAXACJzqU60rwIgFkQYjQ/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"Adsuren","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/13vD63-iUc9eMgQz0Ycoi-n7LMDfw_I6NWImY6N_fqNA/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"Emberstran","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1oECFiNos1Qqa1CfGo-2DJWbyet9SOF_gMKd3ZR2kY6c/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"Nunglthil","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Uow9Y0-_llBAp4meZsA-QEFTmMslbMV_IlgYV3UjNxg/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"O'naren","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ot7DXOzqFjYKucVqVu-tqmTRflrfBKSAwRZjNZtGLXU/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"Scarwatch Hold","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1U1YgTimFZtG1VsC4fjWoh1wVCxGGdokU4peu8hh6jx8/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"},{"label":"Shademoor","href":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Bq6DDjHDkgMwH6-rko5hITz-hCnT5MmcbPIOwCavM-E/edit?usp=sharing","description":"Full documentation available"}]

props.title: The World of Myrdae
props.description: Map and location truth should live outside this app. Use the portal to reach the Knowledge Base and map resources.

props.title: History
props.description: The canonical timeline, eras, and historical notes are maintained in the Knowledge Base.

props.links: [{"title":"Suwanee Gamers Knowledge Base","description":"Open the Myrdae timeline and history references.","href":"http://kb.suwaneegamers.net","label":"Open KB"}]

props.title: Pantheon
props.description: The gods, divine factions, and religious history of Myrdae are canonical in the Knowledge Base.

props.links: [{"title":"Suwanee Gamers Knowledge Base","description":"Open the canonical pantheon and religion references.","href":"http://kb.suwaneegamers.net","label":"Open KB"}]

props.title: Territories
props.description: The political regions, kingdoms, and wilderness areas of Myrdae. Each entry lists the capital and primary languages. Linked titles open the capital's full entry in the location archive.

props.title: Aelbon — Capital: Dhá Chaomhnóir
props.content:
Languages: Common
Lush territory nestled in southern Inverland, known for its rich natural resources, fertile fields, and thriving wildlife.

props.title: Kholdur
props.content: Capital: Thel Kholdur · Languages: Common, Dwarven

props.title: Okodia
props.content: Capital: Skrettel · Languages: Common, Gnomish, Halfling

props.title: Maps of Myrdae
props.description: This page is the doorway for map resources. The Knowledge Base should remain the canonical location index.

props.links: [{"title":"Suwanee Gamers Knowledge Base","description":"Open canonical map notes, locations, territories, and table handouts.","href":"http://kb.suwaneegamers.net","label":"Open KB"},{"title":"Legacy Map Pages","description":"Open the original Google Site map pages for comparison and reference.","href":"https://sites.google.com/view/suwanee-gamers/","label":"Open Legacy Site"}]

props.title: Previous Campaigns
props.description: Completed and archived campaigns should be maintained in the Knowledge Base so the portal stays lightweight.

props.title: Test Page
props.description: A working space for testing every asset type and layout feature before it moves into production pages.

props.title: Section Heading Block
props.description: Eyebrow, heading, and intro copy for any page section.

props.content: This is a Text Block. It renders a styled paragraph of body text. You can set alignment to left or center and type as much content as needed. This block is great for lore entries, announcements, or any descriptive copy.

props.title: Gold Callout
props.content: This is a highlighted callout in Gold. Try switching the accent to Arcane or Blood in the props panel.

props.title: Arcane Callout
props.content: This callout uses the Arcane purple accent.

props.title: Card — Column 1
props.description: This card is assigned to column 1 of the 2-column page grid. Use the Column Placement picker in Edit Block to move it.

props.title: Card — Column 2
props.description: This card is assigned to column 2. Both cards demonstrate side-by-side placement using the page grid.
